tools.name: log_trade
tools.description: Log a trade with full context for self-learning analysis. Use this after every trade (win or loss) to build your trading history. Required fields: symbol, direction, entry, exit, pnl_percent, result. Optional: leverage, reason, indicators (JSON), market_context (JSON), notes. To view logged trades, use list_trades or show_stats instead.

pnl_percent.description: Profit/Loss percentage (positive for win, negative for loss)

indicators.description: JSON string with indicator values at entry (optional)

tools.name: analyze
tools.description: Analyze trading patterns to discover what works and what does not. Use this to get insights on win rates by direction, day of week, RSI ranges, leverage, and symbols. Outputs key insights with suggested rules. Run generate_rules to get actionable trading rules based on this analysis.

direction.description: Filter analysis by direction (LONG or SHORT)

tools.name: generate_rules
tools.description: Extract actionable trading rules from your trade history. Analyzes patterns and outputs rules like PREFER LONG on Mondays or AVOID high leverage. Rules are saved to learned_rules.json and used by update_memory. Run analyze first to understand patterns.

tools.name: update_memory
tools.description: Apply learned trading rules to your agent MEMORY.md file. Reads rules from learned_rules.json (generated by generate_rules) and appends a Learned Rules section. Use dry-run to preview changes before applying.

memory_path.description: Path to the MEMORY.md file to update

dry_run.description: Preview changes without writing to file

messages.content: {"rules": [{"type": "PREFER", "category": "direction", "rule": "PREFER LONG positions", "evidence": "Win rate: 100% over 3 trades", "confidence": "HIGH"}, {"type": "AVOID", "category": "direction", "rule": "AVOID SHORT positions", "evidence": "Win rate: 0% over 2 trades", "confidence": "MEDIUM"}, {"type": "AVOID", "category": "risk", "rule": "AVOID leverage >= 10x", "evidence": "Win rate: 0% over 1 high-leverage trades", "confidence": "MEDIUM"}], "total_rules": 3}

{"overall": {"total_trades": 3, "win_rate": 66.67, "total_pnl": 1.91, "wins": 2, "losses": 1}, "by_direction": [{"value": "LONG", "win_rate": 100.0, "n": 2, "avg_pnl": 1.44}], "by_day": [{"value": "monday", "win_rate": 50.0, "n": 2, "avg_pnl": 0.34}], "insights": [{"action": "PREFER", "message": "LONG shows 100% win rate over 2 trades", "impact": 33.33}, {"action": "AVOID", "message": "monday shows 50% win rate over 2 trades", "impact": -16.67}], "summary": "Analyzed 3 trades with 66.7% win rate. Top pattern: PREFER because LONG shows 100% win rate over 2 trades. Context: The agent wants to reinforce high-conviction long setups."}
